caption: The video captures a soccer training session at a stadium with red seats and various advertisements on the walls. Initially, a goalkeeper, dressed in a blue jersey and black shorts, is seen holding a soccer ball, preparing to throw it. A coach or another player, wearing a black tracksuit and a face mask, stands nearby, observing. The scene then transitions to a different part of the field where a player in a blue jersey and green shorts is practicing dribbling around cones. The player appears focused, demonstrating agility and control over the ball. The overall atmosphere suggests a professional training environment, with players honing their skills under the guidance of coaches.
